ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed by the participant */,
  "study_group" TEXT /* Study group to which the participant belongs */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration for the study */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion of the study */,
  "total_trials_completed" INTEGER /* Total number of trials completed by the participant */,
  "total_correct_answers" INTEGER /* Total number of correct answers by the participant */,
  "average_response_time" REAL /* Average response time of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blap_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blap trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source similarity */,
  "participant_agreement" REAL /* Proportion of times the participant agreed with the source */,
  "participant_correct" REAL /* Proportion of times the participant was correct */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the participant */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blap_trials_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blap_trials_similarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("similarity_id") REFERENCES source_similarities ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blap_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blap_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "political_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source similarity */,
  "participant_agreement" REAL /* Proportion of times the participant agreed with the source */,
  "participant_correct" REAL /* Proportion of times the participant was correct */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the participant */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_trials_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_trials_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_political_trials_similarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("similarity_id") REFERENCES source_similarities ("similarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "learning_stage" (
  "learning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each learning stage entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "participant_accuracy" REAL /* Proportion of correct answers in the learning stage */,
  "learning_test_score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the participant in the learning test */,
  "time_to_complete" REAL /* Time taken to complete the learning stage */,
  "learning_stage_type" TEXT /* Type of the learning stage (e.g., pre-test, post-test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("learning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_learning_stage_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similarity_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source similarity */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant for source similarity */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_ratings_rating_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_type_id") REFERENCES rating_types ("rating_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_ratings_similarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("similarity_id") REFERENCES source_similarities ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similarity_ratings_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competence_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competence rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source similarity */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant for source competence */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competence_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competence_ratings_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competence_ratings_similarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("similarity_id") REFERENCES source_similarities ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_competence_ratings_rating_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_type_id") REFERENCES rating_types ("rating_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attention_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attention check */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the participant in the attention check */,
  "time_to_complete" REAL /* Time taken to complete the attention check */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of attention check (e.g., math problem, true/false question) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attention_checks_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type (e.g., blap, political) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_types" (
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source type */,
  "source_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the source type (e.g., accurate, random) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_similarities" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source similarity level */,
  "similarity_name" TEXT /* Name of the similarity level (e.g., similar, dissimilar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the similarity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_types" (
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating type */,
  "rating_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating type (e.g., similarity, competence) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant rating */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source similarity */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_ratings_similarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("similarity_id") REFERENCES source_similarities ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_ratings_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_ratings_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_ratings_rating_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_type_id") REFERENCES rating_types ("rating_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_participant" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial-participant link */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participant_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES blap_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participant_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_participant_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES political_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial result */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial type */,
  "source_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source type */,
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source similarity */,
  "participant_agreement" REAL /* Proportion of times the participant agreed with the source */,
  "participant_correct" REAL /* Proportion of times the participant was correct */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the participant */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_source_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_type_id") REFERENCES source_types ("source_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_similarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("similarity_id") REFERENCES source_similarities ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES blap_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_results_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES political_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personality_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each personality trait */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the personality trait (e.g., extraversion, agreeableness) */,
  "trait_score" REAL /* Score of the participant on the personality trait */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personality_traits_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)
